summary.zh: 通过裁切与轻微位移逐步展示内容，适合标题、媒体和分段内容。
summary.en: Reveal content with clipping and slight travel for headings, media, and sections.

definition.zh: 内容逐步显露，通常通过动画化裁切路径或遮罩实现。
definition.en: A moving clipping boundary or mask exposes content progressively.

description.zh: 控制一次动效完成所需的时间。
description.en: Controls the time required for one motion cycle.

description.zh: 控制元素移动的空间距离。
description.en: Controls how far the element travels.

description.zh: 控制动效开始前的等待时间。
description.en: Controls the wait before motion begins.

description.zh: 控制速度随时间变化的方式。
description.en: Controls how velocity changes over time.

purpose.zh: 按明确边界逐步显露标题、媒体或分段内容，帮助用户理解阅读顺序。
purpose.en: Uncover headings, media, or sections along a clear boundary to support reading order.

frequency.zh: 适合低频重点内容；列表和常驻正文避免逐项重复揭示。
frequency.en: Reserve for low-frequency emphasis; avoid repeating it across lists or persistent body text.

trigger.zh: 由首屏进入、章节切换或媒体准备完成触发，揭示方向跟随内容结构。
trigger.en: Trigger on initial view, section changes, or media readiness, with direction following content structure.

enterExit.zh: 进入时裁切区域从小到完整；离开仅在信息确实被移除时反向收拢。
enterExit.en: Expand the clipped area on enter; reverse it on exit only when information is genuinely removed.

interruptibility.zh: 中断时保留当前裁切边界，并从该边界继续到新目标。
interruptibility.en: Preserve the current clipping boundary on interruption and continue toward the new target.

gestureRules.zh: 无需拖拽；Before / after slider 才使用可手势控制的揭示边界。
gestureRules.en: No drag is required; use Before / after slider for a gesture-controlled reveal boundary.

reducedMotion.zh: 直接显示完整内容，最多保留短淡入；禁止隐藏延迟影响阅读。
reducedMotion.en: Show the complete content immediately with at most a short fade, avoiding delayed readability.

reviewNotes.zh: 确认裁切不会截断焦点轮廓。
reviewNotes.en: Ensure clipping never cuts off focus outlines.

reviewNotes.zh: 检查文本在动画每一帧都保持可读。
reviewNotes.en: Keep text readable throughout every animation frame.
